title: santalum lanaiense
intro: Santalum lanaiense, also known as Lanai sandalwood, is a species of sandalwood native to the island of Lanai in Hawaii. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Santalum lanaiense include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, and dried wood chips, which are used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for their therapeutic properties.
